_description: Budget allocation, tracking, and approval workflow. Depends on Org Structure, Chart of Accounts, Fiscal Calendar (Layer 0). Tracks allocated/committed/spent with reactive computations for remaining/variance/utilization. Includes 3-stage approval process and budget transfer management.
_cross_layer_note: Cross-layer relators to erp-org-unit, erp-gl-account, erp-fiscal-period, and erp-party are NOT included because those universals are defined in separate apps. They would be: erp-budget-scope-rel (budget->org-unit), erp-budget-period-rel (budget->fiscal-period), erp-budgetline-account-rel (budget-line->gl-account), erp-budget-owner-rel (budget->party).
_organizations_note: Organizations defined in app_erp_base. Load app_erp_base first.
_tenants_note: Tenants defined in app_erp_base. Load app_erp_base first.

description.en: Lifecycle states for a budget: Draft, Submitted, Approved, Frozen, Closed, Rejected
Classification of budget purpose: Operating, Capital, Project, Department
Budget allocation header. Represents a complete budget for a scope and period. An institutional object with lifecycle states (Draft through Closed).
Individual allocation within a budget. The atomic unit carrying allocated, committed, spent, and computed remaining/variance/utilization amounts.
Immutable snapshot of a budget line-state at a point in time. Only one version is active; historical versions are read-only audit records.
Snapshot of a single budget line financial state at the time the version was created. Immutable record.
Reallocation of funds between budget lines. A temporal event that transfers allocation from one line to another.
Materialized aggregate output universal for budget intelligence artifact definitions
Department manager who initiates and reviews budgets at the department level
Finance director who reviews budget compliance and financial feasibility
Chief Financial Officer who provides final approval for budgets above threshold
3-stage budget approval: Department Review (Dept Manager), Finance Review (Finance Director), Executive Approval (CFO)
Department manager reviews budget for completeness and alignment with departmental priorities
Finance director reviews budget for compliance with financial policies and cross-departmental consistency
CFO provides final approval for budgets, conditionally required above threshold
Obligation for the department manager to review and approve the budget
Obligation for the finance director to review budget compliance
Obligation for the CFO to provide final budget approval
Budget contains budget lines. Composition: lines do not exist independently of their budget.
Budget is classified by type (Operating, Capital, Project, Department)
Budget can have multiple versions. Aggregation: versions survive budget restructuring as historical records.
Version contains immutable version-lines (snapshots). Composition: version-lines exist only as part of their version.
Transfer draws funds from this budget line (source of funds)
Transfer deposits funds to this budget line (destination of funds)

universals._comment: === COMPOSITION RELATOR: Process -> Dept Review Stage ===
=== COMPOSITION RELATOR: Process -> Finance Review Stage ===
=== COMPOSITION RELATOR: Process -> Executive Approval Stage ===
=== COMPOSITION RELATOR: Dept Review Stage -> Obligation ===
=== COMPOSITION RELATOR: Finance Review Stage -> Obligation ===
=== COMPOSITION RELATOR: Exec Approval Stage -> Obligation ===

description.en: Human-readable budget name (e.g., Engineering Q3 2026 Operating Budget)
Aggregate of all budget line allocations. Computed via erp-budget-total-calc.
Date when budget status transitioned to Approved. Null until approval.
Current lifecycle state of the budget
Free-text notes, justification, or commentary
Human-readable description of the budget line (e.g., Cloud Infrastructure)
Planned allocation amount. Input property.
Amount committed via POs and contracts. Input property (updated from Layer 2).
Actual expenditure. Input property (updated from Layer 2).
Computed: allocated - committed - spent. Output of erp-budgetline-remaining-calc.
Computed: allocated - spent. Output of erp-budgetline-variance-calc.
Computed: (spent / allocated) * 100. Output of erp-budgetline-utilization-calc.
Version identifier: V1, V2, ORIGINAL, REVISED, FINAL
Date this version was created or finalized
Whether this is the current active version. Only one version per budget should be active.
Copied from the source budget line description at snapshot time
Allocated amount at the time the version was created. Immutable.
Committed amount at snapshot time. Immutable.
Spent amount at snapshot time. Immutable.

property_definitions._comment: === Version Line: GL Account Reference (denormalized snapshot) ===

description.en: Seed ID or label of the GL account. Denormalized from the source line relator to preserve the snapshot.
Amount being reallocated between budget lines
When the transfer was executed or requested
Justification for the reallocation
Categorical values: Pending, Approved, Rejected
Emitted when a budget completes the approval process and status transitions to Approved
Emitted when a budget line utilization exceeds the configured threshold (90%)
Emitted when a budget transfer between lines is approved and executed

computations._comment: === COMPUTATION: Budget Line Remaining = allocated - committed - spent ===

description.en: Computes remaining = allocated - committed - spent for each budget line

computations.formula: let a = allocated.value; let c = committed.value; let s = spent.value; a - c - s

computations._comment: === COMPUTATION: Budget Line Variance = allocated - spent ===

description.en: Computes variance = allocated - spent for each budget line

computations.formula: let a = allocated.value; let s = spent.value; a - s

description.en: Computes utilization percentage = (spent / allocated) * 100, returns 0 if allocated is zero

computations.formula: let a = allocated.value; let s = spent.value; if a > 0.0 { (s / a) * 100.0 } else { 0.0 }

computations._comment: === COMPUTATION: Budget Total = sum of line allocations ===

description.en: Aggregates all budget line allocated amounts to compute the budget header total

artifact_definitions._note: Dimensions reference cross-layer relators (erp-budget-scope-rel, erp-budgetline-account-rel) that are not defined in this app. The artifact dimensions below use simplified Property-type sources as placeholders. In production, these would use RelatorPath sources traversing cross-app relators.
artifact_definitions.name: Budget Utilization by Department

description.en: Aggregates budget line financial metrics by department and GL account type. Provides real-time visibility into spending against plan.

artifact_definitions._comment: === ARTIFACT 2: Budget Variance by Fiscal Period ===
artifact_definitions._note: Period dimension would use RelatorPath through cross-app erp-budget-period-rel. Simplified to Property source as placeholder.
artifact_definitions.name: Budget Variance by Fiscal Period

description.en: Aggregates budget line financial metrics by fiscal period. Enables period-over-period comparison and trend analysis.

Budget allocation, tracking, and approval workflow. Manages budgets with line-level financial tracking (allocated/committed/spent), reactive computations (remaining/variance/utilization), version snapshots, and transfers. Includes 3-stage approval process.
Core budget management: budgets, lines, versions, transfers
Intelligence artifacts: utilization by department, variance by period
Budget approval process: department review, finance review, executive approval
